name: Rebirth:Which is my toilet
short_description: Which is my toilet is a satirical anomaly puzzle. You are the Reborn, assigned a random identity (97 genders + MEMES). Decipher absurd, ever-changing restroom signs in an infinite maze to find YOUR door. Choose wrong? Loop back! A unique blend of observation and dark humor.
detailed_description:
🚽Rebirth:Which is my toilet: A Survival Anomaly Game

When public restroom signs are harder to decipher than Morse codes, your bladder is the last compass!

You are the Reborn—thrust into an infinitely looping toilet maze to complete the most absurd survival challenge: finding the one correct door that matches your current identity and allows you to enter.

This is a satirical anomaly game blending observation puzzle mechanics with dark humor and commentary on modern identity.

Core Gameplay: Who Are You Today?

Every run grants you a new, randomly generated, and often chaotic identity profile:

  • Period: T in office / B in office

  • Chromosome: From xxxxxxxx to yyyyyyyy

  • Gender Identity: 97 Official Options + Memes (Gunship / Wallmart Bag / Hideyoshi...)

  • New Status: Self-recognition as a monkey / Determined to be the great Cthulhu...

The Confusing Signage System

The challenge lies in observing the ever-changing, confusing toilet signage and deciding if your current identity profile is permitted to pass.

  • Observe and Interpret: Analyze the cryptic signs, which are constantly keeping pace with the times.

  • Choose Wisely: Select the right door to proceed to the next loop.

  • Anomaly Rules: If the door is wrong, turn back immediately—just like the classic anomaly observation games you know.

Features

  • A challenging and highly replayable Anomaly/Observation puzzle loop.

  • A powerful randomizer offering hundreds of unique identity combinations.

  • Sharp, satirical humor targeting modern identity politics and pop culture.

  • Unique visual art style centered around confusing public sign systems.

(Note: This fictional work is not inspired by historical events or characters, and is designed, developed, and produced by a culturally limited team of unknown beliefs, sexualities, and genders. The characters, locations, and elements involved are purely fictitious and any similarities are coincidental.)
